title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!
